ops.text:
RECOVERY LANE (E25 completion from disk, 2026-07-19). Prior lane's return was lost; reconstructing state from disk before any spend.

DISK STATE FOUND: sample.jsonl = full 200 rows, all unique, exactly matching the pre-registered allocation (direction 40, wrong_approach 25, operational_directive 25, new_task 22, status_update 18, incorrect_change 15, question 15, unwanted_action 12, style_violation 12, premature 10, other 6). labels.jsonl = 94 rows, all in-sample, 0 dupes: direction 40 (complete), wrong_approach 25 (complete), operational_directive 25 (complete), new_task 4/22. The 94 done keys are exactly sample[:94] in the deterministic ALLOCATION order.

DIAGNOSIS: 94 is a CRASH/INTERRUPTION, not a descope and not a budget stop. Evidence: (1) run.log ends at [91/197] with NO completion marker and NO FAIL lines (script prints per-row FAIL on exception and a final return; neither present) => abrupt process termination; (2) labeling stopped mid-category (new_task 4/22), not at a category boundary; (3) pre-registration explicitly intends n=200; (4) matches the orchestrator's note that the prior lane's return was lost. agreement.json on disk (n=79) is doubly-stale: computed when only direction+wrong_approach+14 op_dir existed, never re-run as labels grew to 94.

COST CHECK (measured, not assumed): probe over all 200 => remaining 106 rows total 734,708 prompt chars (avg 6931, max 15972), ~184k input tokens (~chars/4). Full-200 measured ~340k input tokens, matching the pre-reg ~368k estimate (validates the instrument). Est completion cost @opus ($5/$25 per MTok): ~$0.92 in + ~$0.66 out = ~$1.6 (conservative ~$2.0). Fits the $6 recovery cap.

DECISION: COMPLETE the sample under the IDENTICAL prompt (sample_prompt.txt / int-v1, unchanged) and context render (forced summary fidelity). Resume via intervention.py run (skips the 94 done keys, appends the 106 remaining). Then recompute agreement.json + divergent.jsonl over the full labeled set via analyze.py (full_fidelity_keys.json unchanged, already all 30 flagged rows). Run from the jj workspace cc-steer-exp1 venv, reading the read-only immutable snapshot, writing only to E25/out. SUCCESS CRITERION (inherited): agreement matrix (raw + pop-reweighted, bootstrap 95% CI) + per-category + divergent categories + change_kind characterization over raw artifacts; PENDING-E15 discipline — point + CI only, no promote/kill. Raw artifacts retained for verify lane.
